title: perovskia × intermedia
intro: Perovskia × intermedia, also known as Russian sage, is a shrubby perennial herb native to the mountains of western China and Central Asia, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and small blue flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, calm the nervous system, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Russian sage include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Russian sage can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions or added to skincare products for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties.
